chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-3975 of 2023 Altaf Hussain Hali and Others V. DHA and others along with CP-D Nos. 456, 1426, 2210, 2875, 3000, 3100, 3203, 3214, 4001, 4113 to 4117, 4242 to 4244, 4306, 4307, 4351, 4403, 4415, 4441 to 4448, 4476, 4482, 4498, 4568 to 4573, 4587 to 4598, 4616 to 4618, 4648, 4660, 4679, 4681, 4682, 4686 to 4696, 4702, 4703, 4723, 4731, 4787, 4788, 4809, 4862, 4892 to 4895, 4997, 5115, 5273 to 5275, 5337, 5452, 5459, 5545, 6055 & 6083 of 2023 Dated Order with signature of Judge 1.For hearing of CMA No. 21646/2023 2.For hearing of main case 23.02.2024 Messrs. Asim Mansoor Khan, Zeeshan Bashir Khan, Khawaja Shamsul Islam, Rao Imran Taj, Saadat Yar Khan, Ashraf Yar Khan, Asfandyar Khan, Farmanullah, Qubra Ali, Danish Nayyar, Abdul Basit Essani, Syeda Maryam Mastoor, S. Masroor Ahmed Alvi, Qazi Hifz-ur-Rehman, Rashid Ali Noonari, Muhammad Faheem Abbasi, Naeem Suleman, Syeda Safa Wasim, Usman Farooq, Ms. Afshan Rani, Asim Iqbal, Syeda Khizra Fatima Chisti, Mirza Asim Baig, Shahenshah Hussain, Aslam Pervaiz, Syed Arshad Ali, Vera Awais, Mansoor Khan, Kamran Noshad, Daniyal Muzaffar, Abdullah Munshi, Sajjad Halai, Ameen Mohammad Bandukda, Sunder Lal Lohana, Advocates for the petitioners Mr. Muhammad Waseem Qadeer, petitioner present in person in C.P. No. D-3000/2023 Messrs. Imdad Ali Bhatti, Abdul Raffae Soori, Zain A. Soomro, K. Jehangir, Usman Tufail Shaikh, Uzair Baloch for Dr. Shahab Imam, Ghulam Murtaza, Muhammad Asif Malik, Ashraf Ali Butt and Ms. Rehmatunnisa advocates for respondents. Ms.Wajiha Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General Mr.Abdul Jaleel Zubedi, AAG ----------------------------------- This bunch involves similar questions, which were decided in Millennium Mall Management Company case Const.

Rehmatunnisa advocates for respondents. Ms.Wajiha Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General Mr.Abdul Jaleel Zubedi, AAG ----------------------------------- This bunch involves similar questions, which were decided in Millennium Mall Management Company case Const. Petition No. D-132 of 2019, by virtue of a short order of this Court dated 14.12.2023 and reasons dated 06.01.2024. All counsels in attendance submit that since primarily the questions involve here are also similar and identical to those of Millennium case, therefore, this bunch may also be disposed of by applying the ratio of the judgment of the referred case, mutatis mutandis. Accordingly, all these matters available in the bunch are disposed of by applying the same ratio, as determined in the above referred case, mutatis mutandis. All the petitions are disposed of along with pending applications in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
